title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Manya Group South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Manya Group South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manya Group South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Manya Group South Asia Partners:
Manya Group South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group South Asia Partners!
